model.label: MiMo-V2-Pro
model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: While Texas Tech holds a slight analytical edge with superior defensive efficiency (rank 27 vs 67), the season-ending ACL injury to star forward JT Toppin significantly diminishes their offensive firepower and matchup versatility. Alabama, despite missing guard Aden Holloway due to a felony arrest, maintains elite offensive efficiency (rank 3) and has the higher KenPom ranking (16 vs 19). The Crimson Tide's SEC-tested depth and ability to score in transition should exploit Texas Tech's diminished roster, making Alabama the slight favorite in this closely contested matchup.

reasoningStep.title: Texas Tech vs Alabama Round of 32 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Both teams have significant injuries, but Texas Tech's loss of JT Toppin is more impactful given his role as their best player and leading scorer.
evidence: Texas Tech lost JT Toppin (Big 12 Player of the Year) to a torn ACL, ending his season and severely weakening their offense.
Alabama is missing guard Aden Holloway due to a felony drug arrest, but has more depth to compensate.
Analytical ratings: Texas Tech KenPom 19, Torvik 12; Alabama KenPom 16, Torvik 17.
Texas Tech has better defensive efficiency (rank 27 vs 67), while Alabama has better offensive efficiency (rank 3 vs 9).
Both teams won their first-round games: Texas Tech beat Akron, Alabama beat Hofstra.
The matchup features two evenly matched teams, but Alabama's offensive firepower and Texas Tech's key injury tip the scales.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

result.title: JT Toppin Injury Update: Is the Texas Tech Star Playing in March ...
result.snippet: No other team has suffered the biggest blow ahead of March Madness than the Texas Tech Red Raiders. The team lost its biggest star, JT Toppin , in a knee injury , and it is more than likely that he might not be returning in the tournament. Despite this, Texas Tech has remained valiant but their offensive production has not been the same since.
